docstring: Return a lowercase slug made from ASCII letters and digits joined by single hyphens. Collapse repeated separators, trim leading and trailing separators, and return 'n-a' if no letters or digits remain.
issue_summary: Write agent_output/slugify_title.py containing a Python function slugify_title(title: str) -> str. The function must lowercase the input, keep only ASCII letters and digits, join word groups with single hyphens, collapse repeated separators, trim leading and trailing separators, and return 'n-a' if no letters or digits remain. Then call update_issue_status with status code_review in the same response.
